source.text:
# Ecom dashboard — API + frontend (AINL 1.0)
# Webserver at /api (core) + static at / (fe). All behavior defined here.

S core web /api
S fe web /

# Data
D Product id:I name:S price:F sku:S
D Order id:I uid:I total:F status:E[Pending,Paid,Shipped]
D Customer id:I email:S name:S

# Products API
E /products G ->L1 ->products
L1: R db.F Product * ->products J products

E /product G ->L6 ->product
L6: R db.G Product id ->product J product

E /products P ->L7 ->product
L7: R db.C Product name price sku ->product J product

# Orders API
E /orders G ->L2 ->orders
L2: R db.F Order * ->orders J orders

E /order G ->L8 ->order
L8: R db.G Order id ->order J order

E /orders P ->L9 ->order
L9: R db.C Order uid total status ->order J order

# Checkout (payment definition is top-level; in-label use R pay.* when needed)
E /checkout P ->L3
L3: R db.F Order * ->ord J ord

P checkout 1999 usd "Order payment"

# Customers API
E /customers G ->L10 ->customers
L10: R db.F Customer * ->customers J customers

# Frontend: routes, layout, UI, forms, tables, events
Rt / Dashboard
Rt /products ProductList
Rt /orders OrderTable
Rt /customers CustomerTable

Lay Shell Sidebar Main

U Dashboard
T products:A[Product]
T orders:A[Order]
T customers:A[Customer]
U ProductList products
U OrderTable orders
U CustomerTable customers
U CheckoutBtn

Fm OrderForm Order id uid total status
Fm ProductForm Product id name price sku
Tbl OrderTable Order id uid total status
Tbl ProductList Product id name price sku
Tbl CustomerTable Customer id email name

Ev CheckoutBtn click /checkout

C cart sessionId 3600

Tbl ProductList Product id name price sku
Tbl CustomerTable Customer id email name
